name: litestar-skills
description: Opinionated first-party agent skills for the Litestar framework ecosystem

interface.shortDescription: First-party Litestar framework skills: handlers, DTOs, DI, plugins, MCP, SAQ, Granian, SQLSpec, Advanced Alchemy
defaultPrompt: Scaffold a new Litestar app with opinionated defaults (Granian + msgspec + Advanced Alchemy)
Add a Litestar ecosystem plugin to this project (Granian / SAQ / Vite / MCP / Email)
Review this Litestar route handler against first-party conventions
Convert a SQLAlchemy model to Advanced Alchemy with audit columns
